name: Barracuda (SS-163)
events: 9 Oct 1942 USS Barracuda departed Coco Solo, Panama Canal Zone for the Philadelphia Navy Yard.
17 Oct 1942 USS Barracuda arrived at the Philadelphia Navy Yard from Coco Solo, Panama Canal Zone for refit and alterations.
30 Mar 1943 With her refit completed, USS Barracuda, arrived at New London, Connecticut from the Philadelphia Navy Yard.
29 Apr 1943 USS Barracuda departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
30 Apr 1943 USS Barracuda arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
8 May 1943 USS Barracuda departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
9 May 1943 USS Barracuda arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
23 May 1943 USS Barracuda departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
24 May 1943 USS Barracuda arrived at Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
19 Jun 1943 USS Barracuda departed Casco Bay, Maine and arrived at the Portsmouth Navy Yard to repair defects.
26 Jun 1943 USS Barracuda departed the Portsmouth Navy Yard for the Philadelphia Navy Yard.
14 Sep 1943 USS Barracuda departed the Philadelphia Navy Yard for New London, Connecticut via New York.
16 Sep 1943 USS Barracuda arrived at New London, Connecticut from the Philadelphia Navy Yard.
29 Oct 1943 USS Barracuda departed New London, Connecticut for the Philadelphia Navy Yard.
16 Feb 1945 USS Barracuda arrived at the Philadelphia Navy Yard for decommissioning.
